data.content: Observed failure mode: `.foolery-logs/lease-audit.jsonl` shows session `term-1774939778582-yv322h` repeatedly reclaiming `implementation_review` with the same OpenRouter model `openrouter/z-ai/glm-5` after each failure. Existing retry coverage only excludes by `agentId`, so the likely fix is to make take-loop retry/continuation exclusion model-aware at the effective target level while preserving current review-step behavior. Primary implementation target: `src/lib/terminal-manager-take-agent.ts` plus supporting agent-pool plumbing and regression tests in `src/lib/__tests__/terminal-manager-error-retry-retry.test.ts`.
